summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Bingo app with both Music and Traditional Bingo modes. All core features are working correctly including lobby selection, wizard setup, backend APIs, and host/audience dashboards.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 'All numbers have been called' error when no numbers available for traditional bingo
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior but could be improved with better number management

minor_bugs.issue: Expects object but receives number, causing 422 validation error

passed_tests: Lobby shows Music Bingo and Traditional Bingo type selection
Music Bingo wizard step 2 shows decade selection (1970s, 1980s, 1990s, 2000s)
Traditional Bingo wizard step 2 shows Game Type selection (Regular/Lightning)
/api/game/create with bingo_type='music' creates music bingo game successfully
/api/game/create with bingo_type='traditional' creates traditional bingo game successfully
/api/songlist/1980s returns sample song list with 15 songs
Host Dashboard shows 'Music Bingo' header for music mode
Host Dashboard shows 'Traditional Bingo' header for traditional mode
Host Dashboard shows Song List grid for music mode
Host Dashboard shows Bingo Board for traditional mode
Host Dashboard shows 'Next Song' button for music mode
Host Dashboard shows game controls (Start Round, BINGO!, New Round, End Round)
Audience View displays appropriate content for both bingo types
Audience View shows round information and game type
Backend API health check and connectivity
Game state management and WebSocket/polling fallback
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix volume endpoint to accept proper object format instead of number. Consider improving traditional bingo number management to handle edge cases better.
